title: Stables by Workhorse: Real-World EV Fleet Performance in 2024
text: Workhorse operates Stables by Workhorse program demonstrating real-world electric vehicle fleet performance. The electric fleet totaled 13 trucks, including both W750 and W56 models, delivering nearly 154,000 packages during the 2024 peak season. Workhorse uses the fleet as a real-world test bed, gathering data and feedback from depot managers and drivers to inform vehicle design, range and route planning, and durability testing. Based on extensive cost data collected during 12-18 months of daily operations at Stables by Workhorse, the investment in EV step vans has an expected payback of less than five years, without factoring in any state-level incentives. The program operates a mix of gas and electric step vans in a FedEx Ground Independent Service Provider fleet based in Ohio, providing valuable real-world performance data.
